description: CompositionRed and white striped T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a red ribbed collar and tape detailing on the inseam, short buttoned placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, patch pocket on the upper left chest and a vented hemFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not wring, bleach or tumble dryDry flat in shadeMedium ironThe pique fabric and cleverly mitired patch pocket on the upper left chest adds sophisticated styling to this striped polo neck T-shirt from turtle. The cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day, while the fashionable cuts offer a flattering Fit. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with chinos or jeans and sneakers.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
